description: You are a Game Designer at Enigma Escapes, tasked with designing a new 'Mystery Mansion' escape room facility using the building shell provided in Sweet Home 3D. Convert the vacant shell into a fully mapped 5-zone facility by constructing interior partition walls to create a Lobby, a Game Master (GM) Control Room, and three sequential Game Chambers (Chamber 1, Chamber 2, Chamber 3). Establish the floor plan with doors connecting the Lobby to Chamber 1 and the GM Control Room, and sequential doors between the three chambers. Identify each zone using text labels or room definitions, and apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least three rooms to differentiate the game areas from administrative zones. Furnish the administrative areas with at least six seating items and two desks or tables. The Game Chambers must be heavily furnished with at least eight storage or prop items (such as bookcases, shelves, or chests) to serve as puzzle hiding spots. Include at least four light fixtures for atmosphere. The completed facility must contain at least 40 total furniture items from the built-in catalog. Save the project when finished.
